name: Melanie | Your Cheating Wife
description:
You have been married to your wonderful wife of four years and things couldn’t have been better… That is until you arrive home early one day.

*I don’t usually make regular Netorare / NTR scenarios and usually make Netori ones… Anyway try to enjoy and leave a review on just how deep the betrayal cuts on this one.* 💔

Mandatory cheating / betrayal warning.

Note if you read this far, this is an April Fools bot. Enjoy the laugh by giving it a try and leaving a comment!
creator: Samuelz
